modules.name: reflex_cli.cli
documentation: CLI for the hosting service.

functions.name: reflex_cli.cli.login
documentation:
Authenticate with Reflex hosting service.

Args:
    loglevel: The log level to use.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If the command fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.cli.logout
documentation:
Log out of access to Reflex hosting service.

Args:
    loglevel: The log level to use.

functions.name: reflex_cli.cli.deploy
documentation:
Deploy the app to the Reflex hosting service.

Args:
    app_name: The name of the app.
    export_fn: The function from the reflex main framework to export the app.
    regions: The regions to deploy to.
    key: The deployment key.
    envs: The environment variables to set.
    cpus: The number of CPUs to allocate.
    memory_mb: The amount of memory to allocate in MB.
    auto_start: Whether to automatically start the deployment.
    auto_stop: Whether to automatically stop the deployment.
    frontend_hostname: The hostname to use for the frontend.
    interactive: Whether to use interactive mode.
    with_metrics: The metrics prefix to use if enabling metrics.
    with_tracing: The tracing prefix to use if enabling tracing.
    share_deployment: Whether to share the deployment. If None, prompt the user when in interactive mode.
    loglevel: The log level to use.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If the command fails.

modules.name: reflex_cli.utils.console
documentation: Functions to communicate to the user via console.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.set_log_level
documentation:
Set the log level.

Args:
    log_level: The log level to set.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.print
documentation:
Print a message.

Args:
    msg: The message to print.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to the print function.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.debug
documentation:
Print a debug message.

Args:
    msg: The debug message.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to the print function.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.info
documentation:
Print an info message.

Args:
    msg: The info message.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to the print function.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.success
documentation:
Print a success message.

Args:
    msg: The success message.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to the print function.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.log
documentation:
Takes a string and logs it to the console.

Args:
    msg: The message to log.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to the print function.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.rule
documentation:
Prints a horizontal rule with a title.

Args:
    title: The title of the rule.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to the print function.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.warn
documentation:
Print a warning message.

Args:
    msg: The warning message.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to the print function.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.error
documentation:
Print an error message.

Args:
    msg: The error message.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to the print function.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.ask
documentation:
Takes a prompt question and optionally a list of choices
 and returns the user input.

Args:
    question: The question to ask the user.
    choices: A list of choices to select from.
    default: The default option selected.

Returns:
    A string with the user input.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.progress
documentation:
Create a new progress bar.


Returns:
    A new progress bar.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.console.status
documentation:
Create a status with a spinner.

Args:
    *args: Args to pass to the status.
    **kwargs: Kwargs to pass to the status.

Returns:
    A new status.

modules.name: reflex_cli.utils
documentation: Reflex utilities.

modules.name: reflex_cli.deployments
documentation: The Hosting CLI deployments sub-commands.

functions.name: reflex_cli.deployments.list_deployments
documentation:
List all the hosted deployments of the authenticated user.

Args:
    loglevel: The log level to use.
    as_json: Whether to output the result in json format.

Raises:
    Exit: If the command fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.deployments.delete_deployment
documentation:
Delete a hosted instance.

Args:
    key: The name of the deployment.
    loglevel: The log level to use.

Raises:
    Exit: If the command fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.deployments.get_deployment_status
documentation:
Check the status of a deployment.

Args:
    key: The name of the deployment.
    loglevel: The log level to use.

Raises:
    Exit: If the command fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.deployments._process_command_options_timestamps_limit
documentation:
Helper function to process/sanity check the command options for timestamps and limit.

Args:
    from_timestamp: The start time of the logs.
    to_timestamp: The end time of the logs.
    limit: The maximum number of logs to return.

Raises:
    Exit: If the command options format/value is invalid.

Returns:
    The processed timestamps and limit.

functions.name: reflex_cli.deployments.get_deployment_logs
documentation:
Get the logs for a deployment.

Args:
    key: The name of the deployment.
    from_timestamp: The start time of the logs.
    to_timestamp: The end time of the logs.
    limit: The maximum number of logs to return.
    loglevel: The log level to use.

Raises:
    Exit: If the command fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.deployments.get_deployment_build_logs
documentation:
Get the build logs for a deployment.

Args:
    key: The name of the deployment.
    from_timestamp: The start time of the logs.
    to_timestamp: The end time of the logs.
    limit: The maximum number of logs to return.
    loglevel: The log level to use.

Raises:
    Exit: If the command fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.deployments.get_deployment_regions
documentation:
List all the regions of the hosting service.

Args:
    loglevel: The log level to use.
    as_json: Whether to output the result in json format.

functions.name: reflex_cli.deployments.share_deployment
documentation:
Share a deployment.

Args:
    url: The URL of the deployed app to share.
    loglevel: The log level to use.

modules.name: reflex_cli.v2.consts
documentation:
Constants for hosting cli.

Attributes:
    MODULE_NAME (str): The name of the module.
    REFLEX_DIR (str): The directory to store Reflex dependencies, determined by the platform.
    HOSTING_UI (str): The URL for the hosting UI, can be overridden by the environment variable 'CP_WEB_URL'.
    HOSTING_SERVICE (str): The URL for the hosting service, can be overridden by the environment variable 'CP_BACKEND_URL'.
    HOSTING_CONFIG_FILE (str): The path to the hosting configuration file.
    TIMEOUT (int): The default timeout value for network operations.
    AUTH_RETRY_LIMIT (int): The number of times to retry authentication on failure.
    AUTH_RETRY_SLEEP_DURATION (int): The duration (in seconds) to sleep between authentication retries.

modules.name: reflex_cli.utils.dependency
documentation: Building the app and initializing all prerequisites.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.dependency.detect_encoding
documentation:
Detect the encoding of the given file.

Args:
    filename: The file to detect encoding for.

Raises:
    FileNotFoundError: If the file `filename` does not exist.

Returns:
    The encoding of the file if file exits and encoding is detected, otherwise None.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.dependency.check_requirements
documentation:
Check if the requirements.txt needs update based on current environment.
Throw warnings if too many installed or unused (based on imports) packages in
the local environment.

modules.name: reflex_cli.v2
documentation: CLI library for the hosting service.

modules.name: reflex_cli.v2.constants
documentation: The constants package.

modules.name: reflex_cli.v2.cli
documentation: CLI for the hosting service.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.cli.login
documentation:
Authenticate with Reflex hosting service.

Args:
    loglevel: The log level to use.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If the command fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.cli.logout
documentation:
Log out of access to Reflex hosting service.

Args:
    loglevel: The log level to use.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.cli.deploy
documentation:
Deploy the app to the Reflex hosting service.

Args:
    app_name (str): The name of the app.
    export_fn (Callable[[str, str, str, bool, bool, bool], None]): The function from the Reflex main framework to export the app.
    description (str | None): The app's description.
    regions (list[str] | None): The regions to deploy to.
    project (str | None): The project to deploy to.
    envs (list[str] | None): The environment variables to set.
    vmtype (str | None): The VM type to allocate.
    hostname (str | None): The hostname to use for the frontend.
    interactive (bool): Whether to use interactive mode.
    envfile (str | None): The path to an env file to use. Will override any envs set manually.
    loglevel (str): The log level to use.
    token (Optional[str]): The authentication token.
    **kwargs: Additional keyword arguments.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If the command fails.

modules.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments
documentation: The Hosting CLI deployments sub-commands.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.check_version
documentation:
Callback to be invoked for all hosting CLI commands.

Checks if the installed version of the package is up-to-date with the latest version available on PyPI.
If a newer version is available, it prints a warning message and exits.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If a newer version is available, prompting the user to upgrade.

documentation: Create a new project.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.app_history

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.deployment_build_logs
documentation: Retrieve the build logs for a specific deployment.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.get_vm_types
documentation: Retrieve the available VM types.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.get_deployment_regions
documentation:
List all the regions of the hosting service.
Areas available for deployment are:
ams Amsterdam, Netherlands
arn Stockholm, Sweden       
atl Atlanta, Georgia (US)   
bog Bogotá, Colombia        
bom Mumbai, India   
bos Boston, Massachusetts (US)      
cdg Paris, France   
den Denver, Colorado (US)   
dfw Dallas, Texas (US)      
ewr Secaucus, NJ (US)       
eze Ezeiza, Argentina       
fra Frankfurt, Germany      
gdl Guadalajara, Mexico     
gig Rio de Janeiro, Brazil  
gru Sao Paulo, Brazil       
hkg Hong Kong, Hong Kong    
iad Ashburn, Virginia (US)  
jnb Johannesburg, South Africa      
lax Los Angeles, California (US)    
lhr London, United Kingdom  
mad Madrid, Spain   
mia Miami, Florida (US)     
nrt Tokyo, Japan    
ord Chicago, Illinois (US)  
otp Bucharest, Romania      
phx Phoenix, Arizona (US)   
qro Querétaro, Mexico       
scl Santiago, Chile 
sea Seattle, Washington (US)        
sin Singapore, Singapore    
sjc San Jose, California (US)       
syd Sydney, Australia       
waw Warsaw, Poland  
yul Montreal, Canada        
yyz Toronto, Canada

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.deployment_status
documentation: Retrieve the status of a specific deployment.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.stop_app
documentation: Stop a running application.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.start_app
documentation: Start a stopped application.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.delete_app
documentation: Delete an application.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.app_logs
documentation: Retrieve logs for a given application.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.deployments.list_apps
documentation: List all the hosted deployments of the authenticated user. Will exit if unable to list deployments.

modules.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting
documentation: Hosting service related utilities.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_existing_access_token
documentation:
Fetch the access token from the existing config if applicable.

Returns:
    The access token and the invitation code.
    If either is not found, return empty string for it instead.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.validate_token
documentation:
Validate the token with the control plane.

Args:
    token: The access token to validate.

Raises:
    ValueError: if access denied.
    Exception: if runs into timeout, failed requests, unexpected errors. These should be tried again.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.delete_token_from_config
documentation:
Delete the invalid token from the config file if applicable.

Args:
    include_invitation_code:
        Whether to delete the invitation code as well.
        When user logs out, we delete the invitation code together.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.save_token_to_config
documentation:
Best efforts cache the token, and optionally invitation code to the config file.

Args:
    token: The access token to save.
    code: The invitation code to save if exists.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.requires_access_token
documentation:
Fetch the access token from the existing config if applicable.

Returns:
    The access token. If not found, return empty string for it instead.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.authenticated_token
documentation:
Fetch the access token from the existing config if applicable and validate it.

Returns:
    The access token and the invitation code.
    If either is not found, return empty string for it instead.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.authorization_header
documentation:
Construct an authorization header with the specified token as bearer token.

Args:
    token: The access token to use.

Returns:
    The authorization header in dict format.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.requires_authenticated
documentation:
Check if the user is authenticated.

Returns:
    The validated access token or empty string if not authenticated.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.search_app
documentation:
Search for an application by name within a specific project.

Args:
    app_name (str): The name of the application to search for.
    project_id (str | None): The ID of the project to search within. If None, searches across all projects.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The search results as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the search request fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_app
documentation:
Retrieve details of a specific application by its ID.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application to retrieve.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The application details as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve the application fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.create_app
documentation:
Create a new application.

Args:
    app_name (str): The name of the application.
    description (str): The description of the application.
    project_id (str | None): The ID of the project to associate the application with.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The created application details as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to create the application fails.
    ValueError: If forbidden.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_hostname
documentation:
Retrieve or reserve a hostname for a specific application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    app_name (str): The name of the application.
    hostname (str | None): The desired hostname. If None, a hostname will be generated.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The hostname details as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If deployment failed.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.extract_subdomain
documentation:
Extract the subdomain from a given URL.

Args:
    url (str): The URL to extract the subdomain from.

Returns:
    str | None: The extracted subdomain, or None if extraction fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_secrets
documentation:
Retrieve secrets for a given application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The secrets as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve secrets fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.update_secrets
documentation:
Update secrets for a given application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    secrets (dict): The secrets to update.
    reboot (bool): Whether to reboot the application with the new secrets.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The updated secrets as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to update secrets fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.delete_secret
documentation:
Delete a secret for a given application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    key (str): The key of the secret to delete.
    reboot (bool): Whether to reboot the application with the updated secrets.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The response from the delete operation as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to delete the secret fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.create_project
documentation:
Create a new project.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the project.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The created project details as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to create the project fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.select_project
documentation:
Select a project by its ID.

Args:
    project (str): The ID of the project to select.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    None

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_selected_project
documentation:
Retrieve the currently selected project ID.

Returns:
    str | None: The ID of the selected project, or None if no project is selected.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_projects
documentation:
Retrieve a list of projects.

Args:
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The list of projects as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve projects fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_project_usage
documentation:
Retrieve the usage statistics for a project.

Args:
    project_id (str): The ID of the project.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The usage statistics as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve usage statistics fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_project_roles
documentation:
Retrieve the roles for a project.

Args:
    project_id (str): The ID of the project.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The roles as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve roles fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_project_role_permissions
documentation:
Retrieve the permissions for a specific role in a project.

Args:
    project_id (str): The ID of the project.
    role_id (str): The ID of the role.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The role permissions as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve role permissions fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_project_role_users
documentation:
Retrieve the users for a project.

Args:
    project_id (str): The ID of the project.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The users as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve users fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.invite_user_to_project
documentation:
Invite a user to a project with a specific role.

Args:
    role_id (str): The ID of the role to assign to the user.
    user_id (str): The ID of the user to invite.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The response from the invite operation as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to invite the user fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.create_deployment
documentation:
Create a new deployment for an application.

Args:
    app_name (str): The name of the application.
    project_id (str | None): The ID of the project to associate the deployment with.
    regions (list | None): The list of regions for the deployment.
    zip_dir (str): The directory containing the zip files for the deployment.
    hostname (str | None): The hostname for the deployment.
    vmtype (str | None): The VM type for the deployment.
    secrets (dict | None): The secrets to use for the deployment.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The created deployment details as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to create the deployment fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.stop_app
documentation:
Stop a running application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The response from the stop operation as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to stop the application fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.start_app
documentation:
Start a stopped application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The response from the start operation as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to start the application fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.delete_app
documentation:
Delete an application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The response from the delete operation as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to delete the application fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_app_logs
documentation:
Retrieve logs for a given application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    offset (int | None): The offset in seconds from the current time.
    start (int | None): The start time in Unix epoch format.
    end (int | None): The end time in Unix epoch format.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The logs as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve logs fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.list_apps
documentation:
List all the hosted deployments of the authenticated user.

Args:
    project (str | None): The project ID to filter deployments.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    List[dict]: A list of deployments as dictionaries.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to list deployments fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_app_history
documentation:
Retrieve the deployment history for a given application.

Args:
    app_id (str): The ID of the application.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    list: A list of deployment history entries as dictionaries.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve deployment history fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_deployment_status
documentation:
Retrieve the status of a specific deployment.

Args:
    deployment_id (str): The ID of the deployment.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    str: The status of the deployment.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve the status fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting._get_deployment_status
documentation:
Retrieve the status of a specific deployment with error handling.

Args:
    deployment_id (str): The ID of the deployment.
    token (str): The authentication token.

Returns:
    str: The status of the deployment, or an error message if the request fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.watch_deployment_status
documentation:
Continuously watch the status of a specific deployment.

Args:
    deployment_id (str): The ID of the deployment.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    bool: False when the watching ends.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_deployment_build_logs
documentation:
Retrieve the build logs for a specific deployment.

Args:
    deployment_id (str): The ID of the deployment.
    token (str | None): The authentication token. If None, attempts to authenticate.

Returns:
    dict: The build logs as a dictionary.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated or if the request to retrieve build logs fails.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.list_projects
documentation:
List all projects.

This function is currently a placeholder and does not perform any operations.

Returns:
    None

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.fetch_token
documentation:
Fetch the access token for the request_id from Control Plane.

Args:
    request_id (str): The request ID used when the user opens the browser for authentication.

Returns:
    tuple[str, str]: The access token and invitation code if they exist, empty strings otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.authenticate_on_browser
documentation:
Open the browser to authenticate the user.

Args:
    invitation_code (str): The invitation code if it exists.

Returns:
    str: The access token if valid, empty otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.validate_token_with_retries
documentation:
Validate the access token with retries.

Args:
    access_token (str): The access token to validate.

Returns:
    bool: True if the token is valid, False if invalid or unable to validate.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.process_envs
documentation:
Process the environment variables.

Args:
    envs (list[str]): The environment variables expected in key=value format.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If the envs are not in valid format.

Returns:
    dict[str, str]: The processed environment variables in a dictionary.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If invalid format.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.log_out_on_browser
documentation:
Open the browser to log out the user.

This function attempts to fetch the existing invitation code so the user sees the log out page without having to enter it.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_vm_types
documentation:
Retrieve the available VM types.

Returns:
    list[dict]: A list of VM types as dictionaries.

functions.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.get_regions
documentation:
Get the supported regions from the hosting server.

Returns:
    list[dict]: A list of dict representation of the region information.

classes.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.SilentBackgroundBrowser

methods.name: reflex_cli.v2.utils.hosting.SilentBackgroundBrowser.open
documentation:
Open url in a new browser window.

Args:
    url (str): The URL to open.

Returns:
    bool: True if the URL was opened successfully, False otherwise.
A webbrowser.BackgroundBrowser that does not raise exceptions when it fails to open a browser.

modules.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting
documentation: Hosting service related utilities.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.get_existing_access_token
documentation:
Fetch the access token from the existing config if applicable.

Returns:
    The access token and the invitation code.
    If either is not found, return empty string for it instead.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.validate_token
documentation:
Validate the token with the control plane.

Args:
    token: The access token to validate.

Raises:
    ValueError: if access denied.
    Exception: if runs into timeout, failed requests, unexpected errors. These should be tried again.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.delete_token_from_config
documentation:
Delete the invalid token from the config file if applicable.

Args:
    include_invitation_code:
        Whether to delete the invitation code as well.
        When user logs out, we delete the invitation code together.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.save_token_to_config
documentation:
Best efforts cache the token, and optionally invitation code to the config file.

Args:
    token: The access token to save.
    code: The invitation code to save if exists.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.requires_access_token
documentation:
Fetch the access token from the existing config if applicable.

Returns:
    The access token. If not found, return empty string for it instead.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.authenticated_token
documentation:
Fetch the access token from the existing config if applicable and validate it.

Returns:
    The access token and the invitation code.
    If either is not found, return empty string for it instead.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.authorization_header
documentation:
Construct an authorization header with the specified token as bearer token.

Args:
    token: The access token to use.

Returns:
    The authorization header in dict format.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.requires_authenticated
documentation:
Check if the user is authenticated.

Returns:
    The validated access token or empty string if not authenticated.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.prepare_deploy
documentation:
Send a POST request to Control Plane to prepare a new deployment.
Control Plane checks if there is conflict with the key if provided.
If the key is absent, it will return existing deployments and a suggested name based on the app_name in the request.

Args:
    key: The deployment name.
    app_name: The app name.
    frontend_hostname: The frontend hostname to deploy to. This is used to deploy at hostname not in the regular domain.

Raises:
    Exception: If the operation fails. The exception message is the reason.

Returns:
    The response containing the backend URLs if successful, None otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.deploy_backend
documentation:
Send a POST request to Control Plane to launch a backend deployment.

Args:
    app_prefix: The app prefix.
    export_dir: The directory where the frontend/backend zip files are exported.
    backend_file_name: The backend file name.
    key: The deployment name.
    initiator_event_id: The initiator event ID.
    app_name: The app name.
    regions: The list of regions to deploy to.
    vm_type: The VM type.
    cpus: The number of CPUs.
    memory_mb: The memory in MB.
    auto_start: Whether to auto start.
    auto_stop: Whether to auto stop.
    envs: The environment variables.
    with_tracing: A string indicating the command line prefix for tracing.
    with_metrics: A string indicating the metrics endpoint.

Raises:
    AssertionError: If the request is rejected by the hosting server.
    Exception: If the operation fails. The exception message is the reason.

Returns:
    The response containing the backend URL of the site to be deployed and the deploy event ID if successful.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.deploy_frontend
documentation:
Send a POST request to Control Plane to launch a frontend deployment.

Args:
    app_prefix: The app prefix.
    export_dir: The directory where the frontend/backend zip files are exported.
    frontend_file_name: The frontend file name.
    key: The deployment name.
    initiator_event_id: The initiator event ID.
    frontend_hostname: The frontend hostname to deploy to. This is used to deploy at hostname not in the regular domain.

Raises:
    AssertionError: If the request is rejected by the hosting server.
    Exception: If the operation fails. The exception message is the reason.

Returns:
    The response containing the frontend URL of the site to be deployed and the deploy event ID if successful.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.list_deployments
documentation:
Send a GET request to Control Plane to list deployments.

Args:
    app_name: the app name as an optional filter when listing deployments.

Raises:
    Exception: If the operation fails. The exception message shows the reason.

Returns:
    The list of deployments if successful, None otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.fetch_token
documentation:
Fetch the access token for the request_id from Control Plane.

Args:
    request_id: The request ID used when the user opens the browser for authentication.

Returns:
    The access token if it exists, None otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.poll_backend_sidecar_with_retries
documentation:
Poll the backend sidecar with retries.

Args:
    sidecar_url: The URL of the backend sidecar.

Returns:
    Boolean indicating whether the backend sidecar is reachable.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.check_stacktrace_in_log_lines
documentation:
Check if there is a stacktrace in the log lines.

Args:
    log_json: The log lines.
    current_from_iso_timestamp: The `from` timestamp used to fetch log_json.

Returns:
    A tuple of integer and optional timestamp:
        The index of the log line where the stacktrace starts if found, -1 otherwise;
        And the `from` timestamp for the next log query.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.poll_backend_ping_endpoint_check_app_stacktrace_with_retries
documentation:
Poll the backend ping endpoint and check app logs for stacktrace with retries.

Args:
    key: The name of the deployment.
    backend_ping_url: The URL of the backend ping endpoint.
    from_iso_timestamp: The `from` (oldest) timestamp to fetch the logs from.

Raises:
    Exception: If not authenticated.

Returns:
    A tuple of boolean and optional string: indicating whether the backend is reachable and optionally the detailed error message if backend is not responsive.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.poll_backend_with_retries
documentation:
Poll the backend with retries. Backend of the reflex is deployed
behind a proxy with sidecar. The sidecar is designed to come up
and respond immediately to indicate the deployment is successful.
The backend of reflex app can take additional time. Based on this,
first poll the sidecar, then poll the backend while fetching the logs.
Early return these logs as part of the error message.

Args:
    key: the name of the deployment
    from_iso_timestamp: the timestamp to fetch the logs from
    backend_url: the URL of the backend of the deployed app
    sidecar_url: the URL of the sidecar of the deployed app

Returns:
    A tuple of boolean and optional string: indicating whether the backend is reachable and optionally the detailed error message if backend is not responsive.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.poll_frontend_with_retries
documentation:
Poll the frontend with retries to check if it is up.

Args:
    frontend_url: The URL of the frontend to poll.

Returns:
    Boolean indicating whether the frontend is reachable.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.delete_deployment
documentation:
Send a DELETE request to Control Plane to delete a deployment.

Args:
    key: The deployment name.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the key is not provided.
    Exception: If the operation fails. The exception message is the reason.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.get_deployment_status
documentation:
Get the deployment status.

Args:
    key: The deployment name.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the key is not provided.
    Exception: If the operation fails. The exception message is the reason.

Returns:
    The deployment status response including backend and frontend.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.convert_to_local_time_with_tz
documentation:
Helper function to convert the iso timestamp to local time.

Args:
    iso_timestamp: The iso timestamp to convert.

Returns:
    The converted timestamp with timezone.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.convert_to_local_time_str
documentation:
Convert the iso timestamp to local time.

Args:
    iso_timestamp: The iso timestamp to convert.

Returns:
    The converted timestamp string.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.stream_logs
documentation:
Get the deployment logs and stream on console.

Args:
    key: The deployment name.
    log_type: The type of logs to query from server.
              See the LogType definitions for how they are used.
    from_iso_timestamp: An optional timestamp with timezone info to limit
                        where the log queries should start from.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the key is not provided.
    Exception: If the operation fails. The exception message is the reason.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.get_logs
documentation:
Get the deployment logs and print on console. This is roughly equivalent to `stream_logs` but return logs in one shot.

Args:
    key: The deployment name.
    log_type: The type of logs to query from server.
              See the LogType definitions for how they are used.
    from_iso_timestamp: An optional timestamp with timezone info to limit
                        where the log queries should start from.
    to_iso_timestamp: An optional timestamp with timezone info to limit
                      where the log queries should end at.
    limit: An optional limit to the number of logs to query.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the key is not provided.
    Exception: If the operation fails. The exception message is the reason.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.check_requirements_txt_exist
documentation:
Check if requirements.txt exists in the top level app directory.

Returns:
    True if requirements.txt exists, False otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.check_requirements_for_non_reflex_packages
documentation:
Check the requirements.txt file for packages other than reflex.

Returns:
    True if packages other than reflex are found, False otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.authenticate_on_browser
documentation:
Open the browser to authenticate the user.

Args:
    invitation_code: The invitation code if it exists.

Returns:
    The access token if valid, empty otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.validate_token_with_retries
documentation:
Validate the access token with retries.

Args:
    access_token: The access token to validate.

Returns:
    True if the token is valid,
    False if invalid or unable to validate.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.is_valid_deployment_key
documentation:
Helper function to check if the deployment key is valid. Must be a domain name safe string.

Args:
    key: The deployment key to check.

Returns:
    True if the key contains only domain name safe characters, False otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.interactive_get_deployment_key_from_user_input
documentation:
Interactive get the deployment key from user input.

Args:
    pre_deploy_response: The response from the initial prepare call to server.
    app_name: The app name.
    frontend_hostname: The frontend hostname to deploy to. This is used to deploy at hostname not in the regular domain.

Returns:
    The deployment key, backend URL, frontend URL.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.process_envs
documentation:
Process the environment variables.

Args:
    envs: The environment variables expected in key=value format.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If the envs are not in valid format.

Returns:
    The processed environment variables in a dict.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.log_out_on_browser
documentation: Open the browser to authenticate the user.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.poll_deploy_milestones
documentation:
Periodically poll the hosting server for deploy milestones.

Args:
    key: The deployment key.
    from_iso_timestamp: The timestamp of the deployment request time, this helps with the milestone query.
    deploy_event_ids: The list of deploy event IDs to query.

Raises:
    ValueError: If a non-empty key is not provided.
    Exception: If the user is not authenticated.

Returns:
    False if server reports back failure, True otherwise. None if do not receive the end of deployment message.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.display_deploy_milestones
documentation:
Display the deploy milestone messages reported back from the hosting server.

Args:
    key: The deployment key.
    from_iso_timestamp: The timestamp of the deployment request time, this helps with the milestone query.

Raises:
    ValueError: If a non-empty key is not provided.
    Exception: If the user is not authenticated.

Returns:
    False if server reports back failure, True otherwise.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.wait_for_server_to_pick_up_request
documentation: Wait for server to pick up the request. Right now is just sleep.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.interactive_prompt_for_envs
documentation:
Interactive prompt for environment variables.

Returns:
    The list of environment variables in key=value string format.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.get_regions
documentation:
Get the supported regions from the hosting server.

Returns:
    A list of dict representation of the region information.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.prompt_for_regions
documentation:
Prompt for user to enter the regions to deploy to.

Args:
    enabled_regions: The list of enabled regions.
    regions_args: The regions passed in as command line arguments.

Returns:
    The list of regions to deploy to as entered by the user.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.process_user_entered_timestamp
documentation:
Process the user entered timestamp.

Args:
    timestamp: The timestamp string entered by the user.
    reference: The reference timestamp to calculate the returned timestamp from.

Returns:
    The processed timestamp string in ISO 8601 format. If unable to process, return None.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting._validate_url_with_protocol_prefix
documentation:
Validate the URL with protocol prefix. Empty string is acceptable.

Args:
    url: the URL string to check.

Returns:
    Whether the entered URL is acceptable.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting._process_entered_list
documentation:
Process the user entered comma separated list into a list if applicable.

Args:
    input: the user entered comma separated list

Returns:
    The list of items or None.

functions.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.collect_deployment_info_interactive
documentation:
Collect the deployment information interactively from the user.

Args:
    key: The deployment key.
    demo_url: The demo URL.

Raises:
    Exception: If the user is not authenticated.
    Exit: Requests to backend services failed.

variables.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.HTTP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT

classes.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.DeploymentPrepInfo
documentation:
The params/settings returned from the prepare endpoint
including the deployment key and the frontend/backend URLs once deployed.
The key becomes part of both frontend and backend URLs.

methods.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.DeploymentPrepareResponse.ensure_at_least_one_deploy_params

Ensure at least one set of param is returned for any of the cases we try to prepare.

Args:

Raises:

Returns:

The params/settings returned from the prepare endpoint,
used in the CLI for the subsequent launch request.

methods.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.BackendDeploymentsPostParam.ensure_key_or_initiator_event_id

Ensure either key or initiator_event_id is provided.

Args:
    values: The values passed in.

Raises:
    ValueError: If neither key or initiator_event_id is provided.

Returns:
    The values passed in.
Params for backend deployment POST request.

classes.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.FrontendDeploymentsPostParam

methods.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.FrontendDeploymentsPostParam.ensure_key_or_initiator_event_id
documentation:
Ensure either key or initiator_event_id is provided.

Args:
    values: The values passed in.

Raises:
    ValueError: If neither key or initiator_event_id is provided.

Returns:
    The values passed in.
Params for frontend deployment POST request.

documentation: Params for hosted instance GET request.

classes.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.DeploymentDeleteParam
documentation: Params for hosted instance DELETE request.

methods.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.SiteStatus.ensure_one_of_urls
documentation:
Ensure at least one of the frontend/backend URLs is provided.

Args:
    values: The values passed in.

Raises:

Deployment status info.

classes.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.DeploymentStatusResponse
documentation: Response for deployment status request.

classes.name: reflex_cli.utils.hosting.LogType
documentation: Enum for log types.
